title: Pycnarrhena longifolia
taxonomy: Pycnarrhena longifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Asia and belongs to the genus Pycnarrhena. The classification of Pycnarrhena longifolia is further supported by its unique characteristics, including its long, narrow leaves and distinctive flower structure. As a member of the Gentianaceae family, Pycnarrhena longifolia is closely related to other gentian species. Its classification is an essential aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships to other plant species.

Research suggests that Pycnarrhena longifolia may possess cytotoxic properties, making it a potential candidate for cancer treatment.
